SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Facet
Facet metadata used to map parsed year ranges to index facets.
FacetNotation
Human-readable facet metadata for a parsed time span.
FacetReader
Reads facets from a file.
HttpParseResponse
JSON-facing parse response for the embedded HTTP server.
HttpTimeSpan
JSON-facing time span with explicit ISO date field names.
InputParser
Parses an input string using a list of Tokens, created from a rule's input specification by PatternParser, yielding a list of TokenWithValues.
Outputter
Creates a normalized output string using a list of TokenWithValues, created from a rule's input specification and an input string by PatternParser and InputParser, and a list of Tokens, created from a rule's output specification by PatternParser.
ParseErrorCounter
Mutable internal counter backing aggregated parse error statistics.
ParseErrorStats
Immutable snapshot entry for aggregated parse errors.
ParseResult
Structured parse result for callers that need full parser metadata or JSON serialization.
PatternParser
Parses a rule's input or output specification, yielding a list of Tokens.
Replacement
Contains a source expression and a target string for normalization or literal replacement.
ReplacementReader
Reads typed replacements from a CSV resource.
Rule
Transformation rule mapping one textual input pattern to a normalized output pattern.
RuleCandidate
Precomputed rule matching metadata used for fast candidate lookup.
RuleReader
Reads transformation rules from a file.
TimeParser
Converts a textual representation of a point or period in time into:
TimeParser.IndexDaysMode
Output day-index strategy used by parseTime(...).
TimeParserHttpServer
Minimal HTTP wrapper exposing TimeParser via query parameters.
TimeSpan
A time period between two points in time.
TimeSpanParser
Interprets a normalized string and determines what time period it corresponds to.
Token
An element in a rule's input or output specification.
Token.Type
Token categories supported by the rule mask syntax.
TokenWithValue
Input token enriched with the concrete substring matched from the source input.
